body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but gains a translucent violet skin texture revealing faint internal energy currents, while pale cream accents shift to ethereal silver. Wings transform into tattered, wispy membranes of deep violet with ghostly white edges, shimmering with crimson mist along their curved edges. The curled tail tip dissolves into shadowy vapor trailing behind, its spiral form preserved but rendered as a faint, dissipating mist. Body texture shifts to a matte ebony black with subtle energy ripples distorting the air around its quadruped silhouette, maintaining all original proportions and structural shape.
signature_feature: Wings: tattered deep violet membranes with ghostly white edges and crimson mist trails.
